data.summary: Sensei, the special webpage for Part 1 Final Episode of the Main Story is available now! Follow the
data.body:
Sensei, the special webpage for Part 1 Final Episode of the Main Story is available now!
Follow the link below to see what's in store for Kivotos!

https://bluearchive.nexon.com/events/2023/07/special

#BlueArchive![ClEBexPnNqTUnArf92FCVbOo8RTwlUnN.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/ClEBexPnNqTUnArf92FCVbOo8RTwlUnN.jpg)

Sensei! It came out of nowhere, but there's been an Emergency Response request!
Let's find out what's happening! 

https://bluearchive.nexon.com/events/2023/07/special

#BlueArchive

Sensei! We heard there's been some incredible information just released on the Special Page! Let's find out what the big news is! 

https://bluearchive.nexon.com/events/2023/07/special

Don't forget to play the new Mini Game: Foreclosure Task Force, too!

➡️Foreclosure Task Force Rewards:
- Beginner Tactical Training Blu-ray Choice Ticket x20
- Normal Tactical Training Blu-ray Choice Ticket x15
- Advanced Tactical Training Blu-ray Choice Ticket x10

#BlueArchive

[New Mini Game: Clockwork Flower Pavane]

Sensei! A new mini game is now available on the Special Page!

https://bluearchive.nexon.com/events/2023/07/special?section=3&chapter=2

- Beginner Tech Notes Choice Ticket x20
